data.body:
=== SESSION HANDOFF (clean state for a fresh session) ===

FINAL DECISIONS THIS SESSION:
- BUGS: ship SKIPPED (dedicated follow-on epic F6). Confirmed.
- BUDGET POSTURE: GENEROUS initially (to gather better data before tightening). Grounded defaults to come from
  experiments.
- DEPTH POSTURE: GENEROUS initially (same).
- Grounded defaults for CHUNKING + BUDGET to be derived from a ~100-run experiment using DSO ticket data + our
  planned criteria (simulation). After 100 runs we review and decide on a second validation round.

EPIC CREATED: `5fd2-a7c2-0aec-48fa` (alias messy-moose-jig) — "Plan-review verification gate (open->in_progress)".
Proper epic format (Context / Success Criteria / Acceptance Criteria + full design summary + the F1-F12 follow-on
register noted as separate work). Passes our own floor: check_ac = pass (12 criteria), clarity_check = 7/pass.
This epic is itself a planned DOGFOOD review target.

DESIGN OF RECORD: the v4 plan-of-record is in this session log (entry "DESIGN OF RECORD: plan-of-record-v4.md")
and mirrored in the epic description. ~30 verbatim research reports + 6 design docs + the discussion narrative
are all in this log (committed + pushed; fsck clean).

EXPERIMENT PLAN (NOT run this session — context was high; a self-contained PROMPT was written for a fresh
session and is appended immediately after this entry under "EXPERIMENT PROMPT (run in a fresh session)"):
~100 subagent runs simulating the Layer-2 review over a stratified DSO ticket sample, varying chunk size
{1,3,6,ALL} x repeats, baselined at 1-criterion/call, to find the quality-degradation point (chunking default) +
the cost/latency distribution (budget posture) + a dogfood review of epic 5fd2.

NEXT (a fresh session): (1) run the experiment prompt; (2) fold the grounded chunking/budget defaults into the
epic + plan; (3) decompose the epic into the implementation plan (one wave, child tasks with dependencies),
tracked in rebar; (4) file the F1-F12 follow-on register as separate tickets linked discovered_from the epic.

This session log relates_to the epic (5fd2). Context handoff is clean.
